name: m4-built-in-sources-e2e
title: Complete M4 end-to-end: implement the four built-in sources SkillSource, McpConfigSource, McpRuntimeSource, and AgentRuntime on top of ContextFS/VFS, ensure all four are reachable through one unified interface with dynamic watch/stream support where required, and establish end-to-end tests from this milestone onward to prove the integrated source surfaces work through the real stack.
creator: cursor-agent
